blocking_items: Mount immutable authoritative raw source and checksum.
Mount seven pre-IBP and four final kernel tables.
Mount F_pair_total.wl and deterministic symbolic verifier scripts.
Mount Rice–Mele eigenstate/gauge and numerical data/scripts.
bounded_caveats: Projected one-dimensional sigma_xxx only; general sigma_abc is not established.
Center and loop IBP exactness are not claimed.
Loop comparison with Anan Eq.(7) is structural only.
Numerical regressions are not symbolic proofs.
recommended_next_action: Place named immutable source, kernel, primitive, verifier, numerical, and environment files beside this bundle, then run a dry non-interactive replay that stops at every exact reconstruction gate.
